레위기 24:2.content: “Command the children of Israel, that they bring to you pure olive oil beaten for the light, to cause a lamp to burn continually.

레위기 24:3.content: Outside of the veil of the Testimony, in the Tent of Meeting, Aaron shall keep it in order from evening to morning before Yahweh continually. It shall be a statute forever throughout your generations.

레위기 24:4.content: He shall keep in order the lamps on the pure gold lamp stand before Yahweh continually.

레위기 24:5.content: “You shall take fine flour, and bake twelve cakes of it: two tenths of an ephah shall be in one cake.

레위기 24:6.content: You shall set them in two rows, six on a row, on the pure gold table before Yahweh.

레위기 24:7.content: You shall put pure frankincense on each row, that it may be to the bread for a memorial, even an offering made by fire to Yahweh.

레위기 24:8.content: Every Sabbath day he shall set it in order before Yahweh continually. It is an everlasting covenant on the behalf of the children of Israel.

레위기 24:9.content: It shall be for Aaron and his sons. They shall eat it in a holy place; for it is most holy to him of the offerings of Yahweh made by fire by a perpetual statute.”

레위기 24:10.content: The son of an Israelite woman, whose father was an Egyptian, went out among the children of Israel; and the son of the Israelite woman and a man of Israel strove together in the camp.

레위기 24:11.content: The son of the Israelite woman blasphemed the Name, and cursed; and they brought him to Moses. His mother’s name was Shelomith, the daughter of Dibri, of the tribe of Dan.

레위기 24:12.content: They put him in custody until Yahweh’s will should be declared to them.

레위기 24:14.content: “Bring him who cursed out of the camp; and let all who heard him lay their hands on his head, and let all the congregation stone him.

레위기 24:15.content: You shall speak to the children of Israel, saying, ‘Whoever curses his God shall bear his sin.

레위기 24:16.content: He who blasphemes Yahweh’s name, he shall surely be put to death. All the congregation shall certainly stone him. The foreigner as well as the native-born shall be put to death when he blasphemes the Name.

레위기 24:17.content: “ ‘He who strikes any man mortally shall surely be put to death.

레위기 24:18.content: He who strikes an animal mortally shall make it good, life for life.

레위기 24:19.content: If anyone injures his neighbor, it shall be done to him as he has done:

레위기 24:20.content: fracture for fracture, eye for eye, tooth for tooth. It shall be done to him as he has injured someone.

레위기 24:21.content: He who kills an animal shall make it good; and he who kills a man shall be put to death.

레위기 24:22.content: You shall have one kind of law for the foreigner as well as the native-born; for I am Yahweh your God.’ ”

레위기 24:23.content: Moses spoke to the children of Israel; and they brought him who had cursed out of the camp, and stoned him with stones. The children of Israel did as Yahweh commanded Moses.
